checks.stdout:
usage: qphi-p9 [-h] [--tno-csv TNO_CSV] [--fetch-jpl] [--jpl-limit JPL_LIMIT]
               [--out-dir OUT_DIR] [--store-dir STORE_DIR] [--seed SEED]
               [--n-initial N_INITIAL] [--elite-keep ELITE_KEEP]
               [--refine-rounds REFINE_ROUNDS]
               [--offspring-per-elite OFFSPRING_PER_ELITE]
               [--proposal-mode {data_guided,broad}]
               [--proposal-varpi-sigma PROPOSAL_VARPI_SIGMA]
               [--proposal-i-sigma PROPOSAL_I_SIGMA]
               [--proposal-Omega-sigma PROPOSAL_OMEGA_SIGMA]
               [--prior-mode {broad,bb2016,bb2021}] [--tno-a-min TNO_A_MIN]
               [--tno-q-min TNO_Q_MIN] [--mlim MLIM] [--sky-cov SKY_COV]
               [--detect-width DETECT_WIDTH] [--earth-lon EARTH_LON]

Q-PHI: a deterministic multi-lens Monte Carlo inference pack for Planet Nine
(Planet X).

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --tno-csv TNO_CSV     CSV of TNO orbital elements. If omitted, uses built-in
                        demo dataset (unless --fetch-jpl).
  --fetch-jpl           Fetch extreme TNOs from NASA/JPL SBDB Query API
                        (requires internet).
  --jpl-limit JPL_LIMIT
                        Max number of TNOs to fetch from JPL (when --fetch-
                        jpl).
  --out-dir OUT_DIR     Output directory.
  --store-dir STORE_DIR
                        Merkle store directory for replay artifacts (set '' to
                        disable).
  --seed SEED           Random seed (deterministic).
  --n-initial N_INITIAL
                        Initial Monte Carlo samples.
  --elite-keep ELITE_KEEP
                        Number of elites to keep per round.
  --refine-rounds REFINE_ROUNDS
                        Number of elite-jitter refinement rounds.
  --offspring-per-elite OFFSPRING_PER_ELITE
                        Offspring per elite per refinement round.
  --proposal-mode {data_guided,broad}
                        Initial proposal strategy (data_guided uses TNO mean
                        pole + perihelion direction to guide sampling).
  --proposal-varpi-sigma PROPOSAL_VARPI_SIGMA
                        Proposal sigma for varpi9 (deg) when --proposal-
                        mode=data_guided.
  --proposal-i-sigma PROPOSAL_I_SIGMA
                        Proposal sigma for inclination i (deg) when
                        --proposal-mode=data_guided.
  --proposal-Omega-sigma PROPOSAL_OMEGA_SIGMA
                        Proposal sigma for Omega (deg) when --proposal-
                        mode=data_guided.
  --prior-mode {broad,bb2016,bb2021}
                        Preset prior ranges for Planet Nine parameters (based
                        on published constraints).
  --tno-a-min TNO_A_MIN
                        Minimum TNO semimajor axis (AU) for inclusion.
  --tno-q-min TNO_Q_MIN
                        Minimum TNO perihelion (AU) for inclusion.
  --mlim MLIM           Survey 50 percent completeness depth (V mag) used by
                        the detectability lens.
  --sky-cov SKY_COV     Fraction of sky considered 'covered' by surveys.
  --detect-width DETECT_WIDTH
                        Transition width (mag) for the detectability logistic
                        curve.
  --earth-lon EARTH_LON
                        Earth ecliptic longitude (deg) for a tiny geocentric-
                        distance correction.
